category_sources: source_facts.description identifies tfenv as a Terraform version manager.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as tfenv.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project page and README documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/tfutils/tfenv, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says Terraform version manager; current_curation.tags includes cli.
